metadata.description: Praxis — clarity-first agent framework: opinionated taste, a visible process loop, per-project learning, cross-platform. No enforcement.

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Clarity-first agent framework. 33 skills, 7 agents, 5 crafts, 4 pipelines, 6 commands. Primes a visible loop (research → clarify → plan → subagent-driven execution), an enforced design Ship Gate so output never ships generic AI slop, and per-project memory the agent learns (.praxis/memory/) with a retrieval guarantee. Cross-platform: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot — one definition, thin per-host adapters. No enforcement — primes, never blocks.
